notes: Installed the game and hit play. Game ran without any tweaks or changes. Tested a game. Selected heroes and inventory then explored, fought and adventured.
title: The Lord of the Rings: Journeys in Middle-earth

notes: The game would crash before I could even select a resolution. However, once I set the PROTON_USE_WINED3D environment variable (I used the launch options), the game ran perfectly.
title: The Lord of the Rings: Journeys in Middle-earth

notes: The game runs perfectly out-of-box. I tested regular single player gameplay, various graphics options and deckbuilding. Didn't test multiplayer.
title: The Lord of the Rings: Journeys in Middle-earth
